- observable feature: bright orange and blue petals
- observable feature: distinctive bird-like shape
- observable feature: long, pointed orange bracts
</features>

- IF [observable visual features = bright orange, daisy-like flowers] THEN [4]
</kb>
<rule_check>

</rule_check>
<response>7</response>
